steps.title: Use two graph points
Find the function
steps.content:
Solve the two equations for $a$ and $b$:
$$
a=14-2b
$$
$$
a=30-6b
$$
$$
14-2b=30-6b
$$
$$
b=4
$$
Then $a=6$, so 
$$
f(x)=\frac{6}{x+4}
$$

steps.title: Shift the input
steps.content: Because $g(x)=f(x+4)$, replace $x$ in $f$ with $x+4$: $$ g(x)=\frac{6}{(x+4)+4}=\frac{6}{x+8} $$ The answer is C.
